title: The Dragonfly
actors: Leila Abashidze, Tsetsilia Tsutsunava, Tamari Abashidze
plot: A young, funny, lovely, kind girl from country-side is named Marine but she is nicknamed as Chrichina (Dragonfly). She is very popular in her village because of her happy-go-lucky temperament and singing songs. She lost a chance t...
